title: viola blanda subsp. macloskeyi
intro: Viola blanda subsp. macloskeyi, also known as the round-leaved violet, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the violet family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Viola blanda subsp. macloskeyi can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
